mapper.sql: id, doc_id, content, chapter_path, chunk_index, chunk_type, vector_id, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chunk (id, doc_id, content, chapter_path, chunk_index, chunk_type, vector_id, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{docId}, #{content}, #{chapterPath}, #{chunkIndex}, #{chunkType}, #{vectorId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO chunk (id, doc_id, content, chapter_path, chunk_index, chunk_type, vector_id, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.docId}, #{item.content}, #{item.chapterPath}, #{item.chunkIndex}, #{item.chunkType}, #{item.vectorId}, NOW())
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM chunk WHERE doc_id IN
#{docId}
